notes: Solid, complete breakout implementation with proper collision detection, angle-based paddle bouncing, speed increase, lives, score, high score persistence, and all game states; minor issue is ball starts moving immediately on game start without a launch mechanic, and visual style is minimal but functional.
A very solid and complete Breakout clone, though paddle collisions alter the ball's speed inconsistently and bricks are slightly off-center.
Complete single-screen Breakout with working paddle/ball/bricks and states, but collision physics are simplistic and can produce awkward rebounds so it is solid rather than polished.
